karan-singhal.role: Head of Health AI + AGI Benefits at OpenAI (one of 20 CLAUDE.md tracked cos). The FIRST AMIE-cluster departure from Google DeepMind — announced Jul 22 2024. Stanford BS+MS CS ’19.
karan-singhal.spike: Co-equal first author (listed first) on the 2 most-cited medical-LLM papers in history: Med-PaLM (Nature 2023, 5,747 cites, corresponding author) + Med-PaLM 2 (Nature Medicine 2025, 2,428 cites, 86.5% MedQA). Combined 8,175 cites just from those 2 papers. 21,541 total Scholar cites, h-26, i10-34 (99.9% post-2021). Stanford ’19 (4.1/4.0 MS GPA); initiated + main instructor of Stanford’s first CS+Social Good AI ethics class (Apr 2018). Google Research Jul 2019–Apr 2024 (~5y, federated learning lead author NeurIPS 2021 → Med-PaLM “bottom-up brain moonshot”). Departed Jul 22 2024 (X tweet 923 likes; Greg Brockman: “Welcome!”). Now leads OpenAI’s entire health surface: HealthBench (May 2025, 49K rubric items / 250+ physicians / 60 countries) + Penda Health Kenya RCT (first real-world LLM clinical copilot RCT) + OpenAI for Healthcare (Jan 8 2026 HIPAA, 8 named hospital systems: Boston Children’s, Cedars-Sinai, MSK, Stanford Children’s, UCSF, AdventHealth, Baylor Scott & White, HCA) + ChatGPT Health consumer (Jan 2026, Apple Health/wearables) + ChatGPT for Clinicians + HealthBench Professional (Apr 22 2026, pinned tweet 4,846 likes / 1.6M impressions = peak engagement). TIME100 Health 2026 (Feb 11). Co-author GPT-4o + o1 + GPT-5 + gpt-oss system cards. 2nd AMIE departure CONFIRMED: Khaled Saab (Stanford EE PhD under Chris Ré = CLAUDE.md critical lab, Hazy Research alumnus) now on Karan’s OpenAI Health team per Jan 13 2026 reply (“Remarkable leadership and execution. I’m lucky to be part of this team!!”) — bridges DeepMind health ↔ Ré cluster ↔ OpenAI Health pipeline. Jan 13 2026 recap: “we completed that original plan — in 2026 we enter the scaling era for the impact of AI on human health” (founder-voice). Aug 2023 Rising Stars #4 talk articulated “post-training refinement on real workflow feedback” thesis ONE YEAR before joining OpenAI — ChatGPT for Healthcare is the operational realization. Reference class: Roshan Rao (T1, FAIR → EvolutionaryScale, bio analogue) + Vivek Natarajan (T1, parallel-track comp who stayed). Earliest meaningful departure window Q3 2027 (3-yr vesting milestone). Triggers: (1) OpenAI → OpenAI Foundation move (Yo Shavit May 25 2026 precedent — Karan retweeted), (2) X bio change (currently “Health AI, AGI benefits, safety @OpenAI”), (3) Vivek’s next move (canonical co-founder), (4) Khaled Saab inverse-signal departure, (5) Health team spin-out / external acquisition. Recursive: Nate Gross (Doximity co-founder + ex-CSO, joined OpenAI ~late 2025 as healthcare strategy lead, P0), Ashley Alexander (ex-Instagram product co-Head, OpenAI healthcare product, P1) — the operator+product side of the OpenAI Health founding kernel. Indian-origin (Singhal = North Indian Vaishya/Marwari surname; name-based, not interview-confirmed). SF-based. @thekaransinghal (9,815 followers). Frame: peer/researcher relationship build, NOT pitch — he’s mid-build on the biggest product launch of his career. T1.
